The Rahini Experience

Where the Mountains
Hold Their Breath

Rahini Sunset Villa is not a destination you simply visit — it is one you inhabit. Perched just 25 kilometres from Shimla, where the air turns crisp and the sky bleeds gold every evening, this private luxury estate is designed for those who seek the extraordinary.

Every detail — from hand-selected furnishings to the curated silence of your morning — has been orchestrated to deliver one thing: an experience you will speak of for years to come.

25 km From Shimla
270° Mountain Panorama
4.9 Guest Rating
Shale Tibba Trek
Gateway to one of Himachal's most breathtaking high-altitude treks — right at your doorstep.
Spiti Expedition Base
The ideal luxury rest before venturing into the mystical Spiti Valley — your last taste of refined comfort.
Absolute Privacy
A secluded private estate — no corridors, no lobbies. Just you, the mountains, and total peace.
Golden Sunsets
West-facing terraces designed to frame the legendary Himalayan sunset — nature's finest performance, nightly.
Signature Accommodation

The Rahini
Signature Suite

One extraordinary sanctuary — designed with obsessive attention to comfort, craftsmanship, and the art of the mountain stay.

Signature Suite
Private Mountain Estate · Rahini Sunset Villa
Sunset
Signature Suite

A masterfully composed retreat finished in rich walnut timber, marble surfaces, and bespoke upholstery. The suite features a king bed with premium linens, a glass-enclosed marble bathroom, and expansive windows that frame the Himalayan valley below. Where every dawn is a revelation and every evening, the mountains put on their finest show.

Up to 2–3 Guests  ·  Mountain View  ·  Entire Private Suite
Premium King Bed
Marble En-Suite Bathroom
Glass Shower Enclosure
Smart TV · Marble Panel
Panoramic Mountain View
Luxury Walnut Wardrobe
Premium Linen & Towels
24/7 Hot Water
Velvet Drapes & Sitting
High-Speed WiFi

Why Rahini

Crafted for the
Discerning Traveller

Not every mountain escape is created equal. Rahini Sunset Villa is designed from the ground up for those who demand more — more privacy, more beauty, more authenticity.

01
Shale Tibba Gateway

The trail begins at our gates. Wake before dawn and summit in golden hour — we'll have your breakfast and hot water bottle ready upon return.

02
Spiti Base Camp

Before the remoteness of Spiti swallows you whole, spend a luxurious night recalibrating at Rahini — the last bastion of refined comfort.

03
25 km from Shimla

Just one hour's scenic drive from Shimla — close enough to reach easily, far enough away to feel like an entirely different world.

04
Sunset Architecture

Every room, every terrace, every window was positioned with one obsessive goal: to perfectly frame the legendary Himalayan sunset.

4.9 Guest Rating

Guest Stories

Words From Those
Who Stayed

★★★★★

"Waking up to the Himalayas outside our window was worth every rupee. Rahini Sunset Villa didn't feel like a homestay — it felt like a luxury hotel that the mountains built for you."

Arjun & Kavya Mehta
Mumbai · Honeymoon Stay · Oct 2024
★★★★★

"We've stayed at Taj properties across India. Rahini surprised us — the intimacy here is something no large hotel can replicate. The marble bathroom, the king bed, the mountain view — absolute perfection."

Rohit Sharma
Delhi · Weekend Retreat · Sept 2024
★★★★★

"Just 25 km from Shimla but worlds away from the ordinary. The suite is immaculate — like something from a luxury resort magazine. We're already planning our return."

★★★★★

Our Story

Born from a Love
for the Mountains

Rahini Sunset Villa was not built as a business. It was built as a love letter — to Himachal Pradesh, to the art of genuine hospitality, and to every traveller who has ever sat on a mountain at dusk and felt entirely, completely alive.

We believe that where you sleep shapes how you dream. Every corner of Rahini has been curated to ensure that your time here is not merely a holiday — it is a story worth telling, a memory worth keeping.

Whether you arrive seeking solitude, celebration, or the simple joy of breathing mountain air — Rahini is ready, waiting, and honoured to host you.

"The mountains are calling, and I must go — but at Rahini, the mountain comes to you, wrapped in luxury."

— The Rahini Philosophy
Find Us

Just 25 km
from Shimla

Rahini Sunset Villa is nestled in the hills of Himachal Pradesh, just 25 kilometres and one scenic hour's drive from Shimla. The last stretch of winding mountain road rewards you with views that make the journey feel like the destination.

Distance from Shimla 25 km · 1 Hour Scenic Drive
State Himachal Pradesh, India
Check-In / Check-Out 2:00 PM · 11:00 AM
